flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at University of Akron Main Campus rose 75% between 2021 and 2024 ($11.9k → $20.8k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at University of Akron Main Campus fell 18% between 2021 and 2024 (11.1k → 9.1k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at University of Akron Main Campus fell 12% between 2006 and 2009 (38.7% → 34.1%).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at University of Akron Main Campus rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 ($11.9k → $13.1k).
